feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: RE-FX Leasing valuation Rule Poland and Czech GAAP in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
I want to configure Valuation Rule for Poland and Czech GAAP in Lease Contract RE-FX in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud.

Please can anyone share steps for configuration?

Thank you.

Regards,

Shrinivas

entry.title: How to Create MRP Area and mapping with Product material master App
entry.content:
Hello, I am writing an inquiry because I have a question about the MRP area.

The plant is 4310 and the MRP area is 4310A.

After that, when I try to map the MRP area in the product master management app, the following error appears.
I would really appreciate it if you could let me know the solution.

entry.title: Restriction of Timesheet changes after approval from configuration
entry.content: As per business requirement, I have enabled the Restriction of timesheet changes after approval from configuration change. After enabling the control, their are some cases in which the timesheet needs to be edited. But Even project manager is unable to make changes.

entry.title: How to configure decimal places in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts!

We would like to confirm how we can configure the decimal place setup for our S/4HANA public cloud system.

Currently, our system do not allow decimal place for unit of measurement for weight (kg or g) but we would like to allow third decimal place.

Currently, in the CBC configuration we can see that the decimal place for "Kg" and "g" are set as 0

CBCID：102179（Units of measurement)

Since it does not seem possible to make changes to decimal place value here, we would like to know where it can be managed.

Best Regards,

Fujita

entry.title: how to change Length of G/L Account Number in custom CDS view
entry.content:
Customer has adopted 8-digit Length of G/L account and in custom CDS view level, the length of G/L account is 10 Digits. I_GLAccountInCompanyCode shows the length is 10. how to change the length of G/L account so it can flow in the integration to show the length as 8 digits.

Thank You.

Regards,

Annapurna

entry.title: Business Role's Restriction doesn't work in Business Partner Fiori Apps
entry.content:
Business Role's Restriction doesn't work in the Manage Business partner Master Apps


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Extracting All Available Values for Restriction Fields Across All Restriction Types
entry.content:
Is there a way to extract the available options or selectable values for each restriction field in SAP?





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Automatic OP clearing when using an alternative payer
entry.content:
Hello community,

I have the following challenge.
We only use FI in the public cloud. We receive the invoices via interface from a pre-system. The open items and payments are then managed in the public cloud.
We are increasingly working with payment advice notes and automatic clearing of open items. In this scenario, we have the problem that we have different payers. In other words, the customer is the invoice recipient, but the payment advice note and payment come via a different payer. (e.g. central settlement) The open item is for the customer, we have filled the “Alternative payer” field in the business partner with the corresponding payer. We had hoped that when processing the payment advice note, the system would automatically recognize that the alternative payer wants to settle the customer's corresponding open item.
Unfortunately, this does not work.

We have only defined the business partners with the role FLCU00 (customer) and do not use any sales data, and therefore no partner roles in the system.

Does anyone have experience with the “alternative payer” function or with the scenario I have described?
I would be grateful for any ideas.

Thanks in advance for any guidance!

Alex

entry.title: Confirm Production Operation -Material Movements not listed all-
entry.content:
Hello Members,

I am having trouble resolving the issue in the title.

It is the component backflush setup.
Confirm Production Operation（F3069）does not list all components of the goods movement.
Check Production Order: Inventory Movement (CO11N) lists all components of the inventory movement.

Have you ever encountered a similar issue?
If so, how did you solve it?

I would be grateful if you could help me.
Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Unable to use the Newer Version of uploader FI - Bank Account Balance
entry.content:
Dear Expert 


The FI - Bank Account Balance uploader is deprecated now & its showing that New Version is available. However when I am clicking on it ,  there is a message which is showing Please use App "Manage Memo Records 2.0". In the Manage Memo Records 2.0 App , when I am clicking on create , two fields are PERSON_NAME , Company Code and Memo Record Type . What should we give in Memo Record Type ? please guide.


This is a very important point.Please provide us with a solution ASAP.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Manual Bank Statement not completed
entry.content:
Hi Expert 

We have tried to post manual bank statement by "Manage Bank Statement APP", but the system not posting the same also not gives any error. Hence, Statement Status showing "Not Completed".

Kindly help to resolve the same on top priority. Because our UAT testing is hamper.

House Bank AXI52 

Statement No.  1

CB USER is       CB9980000022

Thanks,

Vinay

entry.title: Create new exchange rate types for Group Reporting currency translation requirement
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am trying to create new Exchange Rate Types for Group Reporting currency translation requirement.

Where should I create new Exchange Rate Types. When I am trying to create in system it is opening in Display mode only and getting below error.

Cust. Object V_TCURV is not mapped in WEBGUIregistry to the IMG activity SIMG_CFMENUCX01_CU05

 

Can you please help me to resolve this issue.

 

Thanks & Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Monitor/Manage applications in S4 HANA disappear intermittently
entry.content:
We have intermittent issues when apps intermittently disappear from the launchpad. 

No business role assignments were changed and clearing the cache sometimes works or waiting till the next day "fixes" the issue.

entry.title: How to restrict authorization for accounting document reversal (FB08) and reset cleared item (FBRA)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are writing to request detailed guidance on how to control authorization for accounting document reversal (FB08) and reset cleared item (FBRA) in our SAP Public Cloud environment.

Currently, we have to restrict these authorizations to only 1-2 members of our Customer accounting team. In SAP on-premise version, we controlled these authorizations through T-code (FB08, FBRA) access. However, we have not been able to locate the corresponding apps in the Public Cloud environment.

 

We would appreciate it if you could provide us with detailed instructions on how to achieve this restriction in the Public Clou

entry.title: S4HANA Cloud Create Outgoing Invoices (FB70) - how to get notes (item long text)?
entry.content:
Hi,

I've been trying to get notes (item long text) entered using GUI app Create Outgoing Invoices (FB70) in S4 Cloud.

And I've seen this KBA 2971277 - Long text is not displayed in Manage Journal Entries.

But it doesn't say how I get the notes that I have entered. I want to find out if there is any CDS view that can support this.

Has anyone been able to get Item long text in FB70 in S4 Cloud?

Cheers,

Tri

entry.title: "project control enterprise project" application not working properly after upgrade 2502
entry.content:
Hi Team,

we have done enhancement in the application "project control enterprise project" . We have seen some upgrade activities happened in last week. After that we have checked the header tab in the application is not coming, and few other values added in the screen.

Attaching for the reference.

 

 

 

Can you please let us know what need to be done in this case?

Regards,

Jagadhatri

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: Delete a row based on a condition in Adobe form
entry.content:
Hi,

  Good day!!! We have a requirement in adobe form where we need to delete a row based on the sales orderitem category but getting a blank row which needs to be hide or deleted.Can anyone guide me how to proceed in javascript.

Have attached screenshot for your reference.

SAP Forms service by Adobe 

Thanks & Regards,

Kathiravan S

entry.title: error when trying to connect to public cloud connection from eclipse
entry.content:
Hi,

 I am trying to connect to SAP Public Cloud system from eclipse via the connection url provided by the client which looks like this. I am using eclipse 2024-12(latest) version and it is showing "You have been successfully logged on

You can close this page and continue in the ABAP Development Tools." in the browser but in eclipse it is showing "Logon to the service instance has failed." Kindly suggest if any solution is there.

entry.title: S4HANA Cloud Trial - Availability of Joule Features
entry.content:
Hi,

I am interested in trying out the SAP Joule features in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud (GROW with SAP). I am willing to take the free trial subscription for this reason. Does anyone know whether the trial version comes pre-activated with Joule features? Thanks in advance for your answer.

entry.title: CDS views of equipment types & groups in public cloud
entry.content: We are maintaining vehicle groups & vehicle types in the customizing (equipment types & equipment groups). I am not able to find the CDS view of equipment types & groups to get the data. Is there any way to get those values?
